Architecture Overview

This is a sample document for testing MarkItDown conversion.

Components

  • API Gateway — routes incoming requests
  • Auth Service — validates JWT tokens
  • Data Layer — PostgreSQL with connection pooling

Configuration


server:
  port: 8080
  host: 0.0.0.0
database:
  url: postgres://localhost:5432/app
  pool_size: 10

API Endpoints

MethodPathDescription
GET/api/usersList all users
POST/api/usersCreate a user
GET/api/users/:idGet user by ID

Notes

  1. Authentication is required for all endpoints
  2. Rate limiting: 100 requests per minute
  3. CORS enabled for https://app.example.com
